eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Bannock; Bonneville; Bingham, ID; at 3:24 PM on JUN 26, 2026 Effective until 5:24 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system.  The Pocatello Police Department is looking for a missing person named Eric Vineyard who was last seen on foot checking out of Country Inn and Suites in Idaho Falls on June 24th and is believed to be in danger. He is a 37 year old male with brown hair and was last seen wearing baseball jersey with the number 23 white Jordan shoes and a straw hat. Police believe he may be experiencing a manic episode and fear for his safety. If located do not approach. If you have any information on the where abouts of this missing person please contact the Pocatello Police Department at 2 0 8 2 3 4 6 1 0 0.
